name: Sovereign Cloud
description: Europäische Datenhoheit über T Cloud Public, Open Sovereign Cloud (OSC), Google-Cloud- und AWS-Sovereign-Varianten — vollständig in der EU betrieben und BaFin-/KRITIS-konform.

issues.detail: Portfolio language is 'en' but description is written in German.
Mentions compliance (BaFin, KRITIS) which implies value, but does not explicitly state the business outcome — e.g., enables regulated enterprises to adopt cloud without compliance risk.
Missing fields: product, created, status, differentiators, use_cases.
